name: Acolyte
description: You spent your life in a temple, learning sacred rites and providing spiritual guidance.
equipment: Holy Symbol, Prayer Book, 5 sticks of Incense, Vestments, 15 GP

name: Artisan
description: You were trained in a craft, from blacksmithing to weaving.
equipment: Abacus, Artisan's Tools, Merchant's Scale, 25 GP

name: Charlatan
description: You know how to manipulate people and use disguises to get what you want.
equipment: Costume, Fine Clothes, Forgery Kit, 15 GP

name: Criminal
description: You made a living through illegal activities, from burglary to smuggling.

name: Entertainer
description: You thrive on performance, whether as a musician, actor, or acrobat.

name: Farmer
description: You lived a simple life working the land and raising livestock.
equipment: Sickle, Carpenter's Tools, Iron Pot, 23 GP

name: Folk Hero
description: You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more.
equipment: Artisan's Tools, Shovel, Iron Pot, Common Clothes, 10 GP

name: Guard
description: You were part of a city watch or a noble's personal guard.

name: Guide
description: You helped travelers navigate wilderness and dangerous terrain.

name: Hermit
description: You lived in isolation, seeking spiritual enlightenment or profound secrets.

name: Merchant
description: You traded goods and services, traveling between cities or managing a shop.
equipment: Pouch, Merchant's Scale, Navigator's Tools, 18 GP

name: Noble
description: You were born into a family of high social standing and privilege.
equipment: Fine Clothes, Signet Ring, Gaming Set, 24 GP

name: Outlander
description: You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and the comforts of town and city.
equipment: Staff, Hunting Trap, Trophy from Animal, Traveler's Clothes, 10 GP

name: Sage
description: You dedicated your life to the pursuit of knowledge and research.

name: Sailor
description: You are a master of the sea, having served on various ships.
equipment: Dagger, Navigator's Tools, Silk Rope, 10 GP

name: Scribe
description: You performed clerical work, transcribing documents and maintaining records.
equipment: Ink (1 ounce), Ink Pen, 5 sheets of Paper, 15 GP

name: Soldier
description: You served in an army or mercenary group, experienced in war.

name: Urchin
description: You grew up on the streets, alone and poor, survived by your wits.
equipment: Small Knife, Map of Home City, Pet Mouse, 10 GP

name: Wayfarer
description: You are a traveler and wanderer, accustomed to life on the road.
